reasoning: The button is immediately locatable (<0.5s): large circular badge with bright teal/cyan concentric rings and cream outer rim stands out strongly against the dark grid tiles and stone floor. Silhouette is clean and unambiguous. Contrast is solid in both the dark red-speckled zone and the gray stone area. Teal/cyan aligns with the Echoes color palette (matching the joystick and 召唤 button). However, the smooth gradient circular frame looks aesthetically mismatched against the pixel-art tileset — it reads as an asset from a different resolution/style register. The large footprint (~1/5 screen width) feels overlaid rather than world-integrated. The teal hue also partially overlaps with the Echo Box entity's palette, creating a brief moment of entity-vs-UI confusion before the badge shape resolves the ambiguity. Echoes-cleanliness is acceptable but not native-feeling. Passes locatability and distinguishment thresholds; marginal on integration and native-feel.
